title: Z-A Battle Music
description: Brings music from Pokémon Legends: Z-A into all Cobblemon battles.
body:
This resource pack brings music from _Pokémon Legends: Z-A_ into all Cobblemon battles. Requires [Cobblemon Intros](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-intros), otherwise the battle intros are cut off.

**Alpha and Rogue Mega music not included.** They will be added if Cobblemon, or an add-on mod, implements them with music sound events.
